title: Colohacks 2026 (Hardware Hackathon)
description: IEEE DBIT organized Colohacks 2026, a 24-hour hardware hackathon held from 24 to 25 March 2026 under Colosseum 2026. The event brought together 92 participants from multiple colleges to design and develop real-time hardware solutions addressing practical challenges. Teams worked continuously under mentorship, progressing through multiple evaluation rounds to build functional prototypes across domains such as healthcare, smart cities, and environmental monitoring. The hackathon fostered innovation, teamwork, and problem-solving under pressure, culminating in the selection of the top-performing teams based on creativity, execution, and real-world impact.
